---
title: "Lecture 10: Control Structures 1"
date: 2025-07-29
summary: "<strong>Conditional Statements and Loops</strong>"
url_slides: 10-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/10-control-1
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Topics

## Before Class

## Readings
